name: Impossible Herbs 'n Onion Pie
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 400°F.
2. Grease a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Cook onions in butter in a 10-inch skillet, stirring frequently, until they are softened.
4. Arrange half of the onions evenly in the pie plate and sprinkle with half of the bacon.
5. Top with remaining onions and bacon.
6. In a blender container, mix milk, Worcestershire sauce, eggs, and baking mix. Cover and blend on high for 15 seconds.
7. Pour the mixture into the plate.
8. Mix herbs in a small bowl and crush slightly.
9. Sprinkle the herbs evenly over the milk mixture.
10. Bake until a knife inserted in the center comes out clean (about 35 minutes).
FOR 2 SERVINGS:
1. Grease two 10 oz custard cups.
2. Reduce onions to 1, butter to 2 tablespoons, bacon to 4 slices, milk to 1/2 cup, Worcestershire sauce to 1/2 teaspoon, eggs to 1, Bisquick to 1/4 cup, and herbs to a pinch of each.
3. Bake for 10 minutes at the highest altitude setting.
